title: MethodTrackRecord
description: One materialized row from `MethodTrackRecord`. The Prisma model is the canonical column shape on the codex side; this schema is the JSON wire-form used by the noosphere aggregator (noosphere/evaluation/method_track_record.py) and by /methods/<name>/<version>/track-record API responses. `nullable` fields collapse to `null` (not absent) so downstream typed clients don't have to discriminate.

domain.description: Empty string means 'no domain label'. Never smoothed across domains.
